title: ravenia infelix
intro: Ravenia infelix is a flowering plant species belonging to the family Rutaceae, which is native to New Caledonia. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its essential oil, which has been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The essential oil extracted from Ravenia infelix has been reported to possess antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections, skin conditions, and digestive problems. Herbal preparations of Ravenia infelix, such as teas or tinctures, can be used to harness its medicinal benefits, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
